verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Don't you worry, little children, Should death knock on your door, Don't you know that death Is the doorway that leads To the heavenly shore. Over there is no heartache, No sorrow, grief nor pain Just perfect love, peace and joy, beyond compare.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: One day I'm gonna take A step towards my theophany, One day I'm gonna take, Another step into my theophany One day I know that final step is going to set me free. My theophany, I hear it calling me.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: And it's calling come up, a little higher, Into the Perfect Word, Come up, a little higher, Into the Agape love, Come up, a little higher, Soar through the heavenlies, My theophany, I hear it calling me.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: Over the next hill I look, Oh, I see victory, Around the next turn in the road, That old devil, he's got to flee. God's army is marching, Marching onward, to slay that old enemy. Around the next turn I see King Jesus coming for me.
